name: hud_ui_widget_release_image_if_owned
description: HudUiWidget::ReleaseImageIfOwned releases and clears an owned non-null image, preserves a borrowed image, and always clears ownsImage.
known_limits: Image release delegates to zVid_Image::ReleaseIfNotDefault; the smoke uses the default image to cover the no-free default-provider path.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ReleaseImageIfOwned@HudUiWidget@@QAEXXZ at 0x4b3da0 still fails: 15 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 34 bytes and the VC object symbol is 48 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows image and ownsImage checks, provider release for owned non-null images, image clear after release, and final ownsImage clear.
The native widget release smoke validates borrowed preservation, owned default-image clear, destructor reuse, and scalar destructor reuse.
